issues.description: First effect missing cost condition: requires DON!! −2 cost and conditional check for Leader type 'Baroque Works'. Should include condition on LeaderHasType and cost deduction not represented in DSL.
SearchDeck action incorrect: should search top of deck and add to Life cards (FlipLife destination), not to hand. Text says 'add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards'.
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack on you), not 'OnAttacked'. Trigger alias mismatch.
Second effect missing: [Once Per Turn] restriction and DON!! −1 cost condition not represented in DSL.
TrashFromHand action present but should specify it's from hand and properly formatted with filter for any card.
